center.name: 非洲之角
center.summary: 非洲之角是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括索马里鸵鸟、African collared dove、Plain nightjar等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The African collared dove (Streptopelia roseogrisea) is a small dove found in the Sahel, northern parts of the Horn of Africa and southwestern Arabia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Horn of Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in the southern Sahel, Southern Sudan, the Horn of Africa and the southwestern Arabian Peninsula

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: daaroodensis - (White, CMN, 1960) | synonyms = }} The rufous-capped lark (Calandrella eremica) is a small passerine bird of the lark family found in southwestern Arabia and the Horn of Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species occurs in Sub-Saharan Africa except in dense forests (especially near the Congo River), the Horn of Africa, the Namib Desert and South Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Other common names include the Karoli fiscal, the Somali fiscal shrike and the Somali shrike. The bird is found in Djibouti, Ethiopia and Somalia in the Horn of Africa, as well as in Kenya in the African Great Lakes region

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: No other populations are included in the CITES Appendices.}} | genus = Struthio | species = molybdophanes | authority = Reichenow, 1883 | range_map = Struthio camelus distribution.svg | range_map_caption = Yellow area shows range of Struthio molybdophanes | synonyms = *Struthio camelus molybdophanes Reichenow, 1883 | synonyms_ref = }} The Somali ostrich (Struthio molybdophanes), also known as the blue-necked ostrich, is a large flightless bird native to the Horn of Africa.{{cite book |last1=Redman |first1=N
